verses.text: Judah kumpite Uzziah, Jotham, Ahaz, Hezekiah, leh Israel kumpi Joash' tapa Jeroboam' hun lai-in Beeri' tapa Hosea tungah Topa in thu na gen hi

Topa in Hosea tung tawnin Israel-te tungah thu a na gencil lai-in, amah in Hosea kiangah, “Hih gammite kei tungah citakloin pasian dangte bia uh ahih manin, nang zong hong tulpihlo ding numei paktat khat ten'pih in la, tuanu tawh ta nei in,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Hosea in zong Diblaim' tanu Gomer ten'pih a, tuanu hong gai-in tapa khat hong nei hi

Tua ciangin Topa in Hosea kiangah, “Na tapa' min dingin Jezreel phuak in; bang hang hiam cih leh ama pute Jehu in Jezreel khua-ah a mi thahna hangin Israel kumpipa tungah gim ka pia baih ding a, Israel mite tungah Jehu' suanlekhakte' ukna ka beisak ding hi
Tua ciangin Jezreel kuam-ah Israel mite' galhiam khempeuh ka sumai ding hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Gomer gaikikin tanu khat nei hi. Topa in zong Hosea kiang-ah, “Na tanu' min dingin hehpihloh, a cihnopna Loruhamah phuak in; bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite ka hehpih nawn kei ding a, a mawhna uh ka maisak het kei ding hi
Ahi zongin Judah mite ka hehpih ding a, namsau leh thal, sakol leh sakol tung tuangte, leh galsimna tawh hiloin, amaute' Topa Pasian ahi keimahmah in amaute ka honkhia ding hi,” a ci hi
Loruhamah a tei khit ciangin Gomer gai-in tapa khat nei leuleu hi
Tua ciangin Topa in, “Na tapa' min dingin ka mi hilo a cihnopna Loammi phuak in; bang hang hiam cih leh no Israel mite, ka mi na hi nawn kei uh a, kei zong note' Pasian ka hi kei hi,” a ci hi

Ahi zongin, tehzawhloh, sim-zawhloh zah dongin tuipi sehnel bangin Israel mite tampi pha ding uh a, tua hunin, “Note ka mi hilo,” a kicih hangin ni khat ni ciangin, “A nungta Pasian' tate,” kici ding hi
Judah mite leh Israel mite kigawmkik ding uh a, amaute a makai dingin mi khat a seh ding uh hi. Amaute khangin citheikik ding uh a, tua Jezreel hun pen a nuam mahmah hun hi ding hi.
